segments.text: Okay, enough ISPF data sets, let's switch gears and get into some TSO commands.
As you know, TSO commands come in all shapes and sizes, but are typically a command name
which can be followed up with one or more operands.
Oftentimes, you know a command can do something, but you're unsure about the syntax of the
operands, so you'll use the help command.
Well, you'll be doing just that here to figure out the correct way of executing some TSO
